SpessaSharp

Struct Event.CbMidiMessage

Namespace
SpessaSharp.Sequencer
Assembly
SpessaSharp.dll

Called when a MIDI message is sent and externalMIDIPlayback is true.

public readonly record struct Event.CbMidiMessage : IEquatable<Event.CbMidiMessage>

IEquatable<Event.CbMidiMessage>

Constructors

CbMidiMessage(ArraySegment<byte>, double)

Called when a MIDI message is sent and externalMIDIPlayback is true.

public CbMidiMessage(ArraySegment<byte> Message, double Time)

Parameters

Message ArraySegment<byte>

The binary MIDI message.

Time double

The synthesizer's current time when this event was sent. Use this for scheduling MIDI messages to your external MIDI device.

Properties

Message

The binary MIDI message.

public ArraySegment<byte> Message { get; init; }

ArraySegment<byte>

Time

The synthesizer's current time when this event was sent. Use this for scheduling MIDI messages to your external MIDI device.
